tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Goku is the main protagonist of Dragon Ball and a Saiyan raised on Earth. He constantly trains to become stronger and protect the universe.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Goku possesses powerful transformations like Super Saiyan, Ultra Instinct and uses techniques such as Kamehameha and Instant Transmission.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Goku's Saiyan name is Kakarot and he has defeated many powerful enemies including Frieza and Majin Buu.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Vegeta is the proud prince of the Saiyan race and one of Goku's greatest rivals.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Vegeta can transform into Super Saiyan forms and uses powerful attacks like Final Flash and Big Bang Attack.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Vegeta gradually becomes one of Earth's strongest defenders.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Gohan is the eldest son of Goku and possesses immense hidden potential.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Gohan has powerful transformations including Mystic form and Beast form.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Gohan defeated Cell during the Cell Games.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Piccolo is a Namekian warrior who later becomes one of Earth's greatest protectors.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Piccolo can regenerate body parts, stretch limbs and use powerful ki attacks.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Piccolo once started as Goku's enemy but became his ally.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Frieza is one of the most feared villains in Dragon Ball.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Frieza possesses multiple transformations and immense destructive power.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Frieza destroyed Planet Vegeta and the Saiyan race.
